verses.text: Wives, be in subjection to your own husbands, that any who obey not the word may 'be won by the conversation of the wives.' Won without words. A godly life can win an unbelieving spouse.
Wives, be in subjection to your own husbands, that any who obey not the word may 'be won by the conversation of the wives.' Won without words. A godly life can win an unbelieving spouse.
Let adorning be not outward, but 'the hidden man of the heart... a meek and quiet spirit,' which is in God's sight 'of great price.' Inner beauty. God prizes a gentle, quiet heart.
Let adorning be not outward, but 'the hidden man of the heart... a meek and quiet spirit,' which is in God's sight 'of great price.' Inner beauty. God prizes a gentle, quiet heart.
So the holy women trusted God; husbands, dwell with your wives 'according to knowledge,' giving honour, 'that your prayers be not hindered.' Mutual honour. Harsh homes hinder prayer.
So the holy women trusted God; husbands, dwell with your wives 'according to knowledge,' giving honour, 'that your prayers be not hindered.' Mutual honour. Harsh homes hinder prayer.
So the holy women trusted God; husbands, dwell with your wives 'according to knowledge,' giving honour, 'that your prayers be not hindered.' Mutual honour. Harsh homes hinder prayer.
Be of one mind, compassionate, courteous; render not evil for evil, but blessing, 'that ye should inherit a blessing.' Bless back. Returning good for evil wins blessing.
Be of one mind, compassionate, courteous; render not evil for evil, but blessing, 'that ye should inherit a blessing.' Bless back. Returning good for evil wins blessing.
'He that will love life... let him refrain his tongue from evil'; 'the eyes of the Lord are over the righteous.' Watchful Lord. God hears the righteous and opposes evildoers.
'He that will love life... let him refrain his tongue from evil'; 'the eyes of the Lord are over the righteous.' Watchful Lord. God hears the righteous and opposes evildoers.
'He that will love life... let him refrain his tongue from evil'; 'the eyes of the Lord are over the righteous.' Watchful Lord. God hears the righteous and opposes evildoers.
Who will harm you if you follow good? 'If ye suffer for righteousness' sake, happy are ye.' Blessed sufferers. Persecution for right is no loss but blessing.
Who will harm you if you follow good? 'If ye suffer for righteousness' sake, happy are ye.' Blessed sufferers. Persecution for right is no loss but blessing.
'Sanctify the Lord God in your hearts,' ready to 'give an answer... a reason of the hope that is in you' with meekness. Be ready. Defend your hope humbly and reverently.
'Sanctify the Lord God in your hearts,' ready to 'give an answer... a reason of the hope that is in you' with meekness. Be ready. Defend your hope humbly and reverently.
'Sanctify the Lord God in your hearts,' ready to 'give an answer... a reason of the hope that is in you' with meekness. Be ready. Defend your hope humbly and reverently.
Christ 'once suffered for sins, the just for the unjust,' to bring us to God, put to death in flesh, quickened by the Spirit. Substitute. The righteous died for the unrighteous.
Christ 'once suffered for sins, the just for the unjust,' to bring us to God, put to death in flesh, quickened by the Spirit. Substitute. The righteous died for the unrighteous.
Christ 'once suffered for sins, the just for the unjust,' to bring us to God, put to death in flesh, quickened by the Spirit. Substitute. The righteous died for the unrighteous.
Baptism, 'the answer of a good conscience,' saves by Christ's resurrection, who is 'gone into heaven... on the right hand of God.' Risen Lord. Salvation rests on the ascended Christ.
